resolutionPolicy.goal: allow agent-side intake from a single dropzone without pushing manifest editing back to the user
notes: Automatic resolution is now landed on the canonical contract-driven shell.
Historical or legacy entry surfaces retained in the repository must not be treated as equivalent intake paths.
If both manifest fields and dropzone files exist, canonical shell behavior should prefer the stricter dropzone mapping rather than ad hoc guessing.

landedBehaviors: The repository root default page now collapses into the contract-driven shell via canonical handoff / redirect.
The canonical contract shell now defaults to dropzone-first asset resolution on main.
Intro assets remain exploratory-only even if files are present.
remainingOpenConcerns: Historical documentation that described pre-landing blockers must not be mistaken for current live-state truth.
The presence of auto-resolved assets does not remove disclosure, truth-boundary or review obligations from the agent.
